summary: Ukrainian forces captured a damaged Ukrainian Armed Forces "Shark-M" fixed-wing drone after its parachute deployed during a kinetic intercept by the Russian "Yolka" air defense drone in the Krasny Liman area. Russian operators from the "Rubicon" Center reported destroying 129 Ukrainian personnel and fixed-wing UAVs across multiple directions on April 18, 2026, including Krasny Liman, Belgorod, and Sumy. Ukrainian forces used FPV drones to kill two Russian soldiers on motorcycles and another who attempted to fake surrender, while also surviving a Russian FPV attack in the Kostiantinivka direction, aided by drone detection equipment.
